title: OpenAI Platform Documentation (Agents/Responses)
why_it_matters: Signals engineering shift from prompt-level demos to runtime/eval infrastructure.
notes: Continuously evolving docs; verify specific features by release notes.

title: Model Context Protocol
why_it_matters: Makes model-tool integration a protocol layer rather than ad-hoc glue code.

title: SWE-bench
why_it_matters: Core benchmark family for coding-agent realism and deployment relevance.
notes: Use with process diagnostics, not leaderboard-only reading.

title: LangGraph
why_it_matters: Representative graph-based orchestration stack for production agent workflows.
notes: Add policy and audit layer for enterprise use.

title: Microsoft AutoGen
why_it_matters: Key framework in multi-agent engineering experimentation and platformization.

title: LlamaIndex Docs
why_it_matters: Strong reference for knowledge-centric agent workflows.

title: CrewAI
why_it_matters: Popular role-based abstraction for rapid multi-agent prototyping.
notes: Needs additional governance controls for production.

title: AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents
why_it_matters: Historical baseline; useful to compare against modern SWE/live paradigms.
notes: Not sufficient alone for 2026 production claims.

title: SWE-bench Live
why_it_matters: Addresses benchmark staleness/contamination concerns in coding-agent eval.
notes: Date uses first public signal in 2025 context; verify exact release post when citing academically.

title: Preparedness Framework / system cards
why_it_matters: Provides governance framing for autonomy/tool-use risk boundaries.
notes: Policy orientation; pair with technical red-team results.
